_comment: PLACEHOLDER. Replace with a real exported recon workbook spec from your Sigma org.
_how_to_replace: 1) Identify a known-good recon workbook in your Sigma org. 2) Find its data-model id. 3) Run: scripts/export-workbook.sh <data-model-id> .claude/skills/sigma-fin-recon/examples/exemplar-spec.json 4) Update reference/structure.md and reference/kpis.md if the real exemplar differs from the canonical pattern. 5) Commit.
_until_then: The skill remains useful via reference/structure.md and reference/kpis.md, but accuracy improves substantially once a real exemplar is in place.
